audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. The implementation computes a shared base seed once per epoch (L680), then for each slot offset i in [0, SLOTS_PER_EPOCH), appends the unique absolute slot number encoded as Bytes8(slot+i) and hashes it with SHA256 (L689-690). Since Bytes8 is bijective and slot+i produces distinct values for distinct i, each preimage is unique, guaranteeing unique hashes by SHA256 collision resistance.
